mapper.select: select id, username, real_name, phone, password_hash, password_salt, status, source_type, first_login_changed_pwd, last_login_at, last_login_ip, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where username = #{account} or phone = #{account} order by case when username = #{account} then 0 else 1 end, id asc limit 1

select u.id as user_id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.status as user_status, r.id as role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.role_type, urr.scope_type, urr.scope_id, case when urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' then g.group_name when urr.scope_type = 'STORE' then s.store_name else 'PLATFORM' end as scope_name, urr.assigned_at from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role_rel urr on urr.user_id = u.id and urr.status = 'ENABLED' inner join sys_role r on r.id = urr.role_id and r.status = 'ENABLED' left join sys_group g on g.id = urr.scope_id and urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' left join sys_store s on s.id = urr.scope_id and urr.scope_type = 'STORE' where u.id = #{userId} order by urr.assigned_at desc

select u.id as user_id, u.username, u.real_name, u.phone, u.status as user_status, r.id as role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.role_type, urr.scope_type, urr.scope_id, case when urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' then g.group_name when urr.scope_type = 'STORE' then s.store_name else 'PLATFORM' end as scope_name, urr.assigned_at from sys_user u inner join sys_user_role_rel urr on urr.user_id = u.id and urr.status = 'ENABLED' inner join sys_role r on r.id = urr.role_id and r.status = 'ENABLED' left join sys_group g on g.id = urr.scope_id and urr.scope_type = 'GROUP' left join sys_store s on s.id = urr.scope_id and urr.scope_type = 'STORE' where r.role_code = #{roleCode} and urr.scope_type = #{scopeType} and urr.scope_id = #{scopeId} order by u.id, urr.assigned_at desc
